title: Villach, Carinthia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Villach, Carinthia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Villach is a city in Carinthia with a population of 64,071. A charming city in southern Austria near the Italian border, known for its thermal springs, the Villach Alpine Geothermal Trail, and the stunning Faaker See lake.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
